name: Coffeecake Eschmann
recipeInstructions:
1. For the topping: Blend flour, sugar, cinnamon, and melted butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. For the cake: Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir in softened vegetable shortening, sugar, beaten egg, milk (combined), and vanilla. Combine well.
3. Pour the batter onto a well-greased jelly roll pan (15.5 x 10 x 1 inch for 20 servings) and smooth the top.
4. Sprinkle with topping.
5. Bake in the middle of a 350°F oven for 30 minutes.
6. Let cool on a rack.
7. Just before serving, dust with confectioners sugar and cut into 4 x 2-inch rectangles.
